summary: Iteration 42: New Case Workflow Backend Testing - 20/20 tests PASSED (100%). Fixed LOADING_TYPES constant to include 'Early Loading'.

minor.issue: LOADING_TYPES constant was missing 'Early Loading' - FIXED during testing

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request. Backend-only testing performed.

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Clinical Examination Fields): PASS - POST /api/procedures accepts and stores all new fields: edentulous_site, ridge_contour, soft_tissue_thickness, keratinized_mucosa, occlusal_scheme, parafunction_habit, vertical_dimension, opposing_dentition, smile_line, gingival_biotype, medical_assessment, medical_risk_level
Feature 2 (Early Loading): PASS - POST /api/procedures accepts 'Early Loading' as valid loading type
Feature 3 (GBR Renamed): PASS - POST /api/procedures accepts 'Implant Placement with Guided Bone Regeneration'
Feature 4 (Prosthetic Plan Other): PASS - POST /api/procedures accepts prosthetic_plan_other for custom prosthetic plans
Feature 5 (Risk Calculator Medical): PASS - POST /api/implant-library/calculate-risk accepts medical_assessment parameter and returns medical risk factor in response
Feature 6 (Logout): PASS - POST /api/auth/logout invalidates JWT token via blocklist
Feature 7 (Rate Limiting): PASS - POST /api/auth/login is rate limited to 5/minute per IP (slowapi)
Regression Tests: PASS - GET /api/procedures, GET /api/auth/me, GET /api/implantlens/cases all working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 16 test procedures (TEST_ prefixed) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Case workflow backend fully verified. Key changes: 1) ProcedureCreate model now includes clinical examination fields (edentulous_site, ridge_contour, soft_tissue_thickness, keratinized_mucosa, occlusal_scheme, parafunction_habit, vertical_dimension, opposing_dentition, smile_line, gingival_biotype, medical_assessment, medical_risk_level). 2) Valid loading types: 'Immediate Loading', 'Early Loading', 'Delayed Loading'. 3) Valid procedure types include 'Implant Placement with Guided Bone Regeneration'. 4) Risk calculator at POST /api/implant-library/calculate-risk accepts optional medical_assessment dict with keys: diabetes, smoking, anticoagulant, osteoporosis, radiation. When provided, max_score becomes 18 (vs 15 without) and Medical Risk factor is included in response. 5) Logout endpoint POST /api/auth/logout invalidates JWT via in-memory blocklist. 6) Login endpoint has 5/minute rate limit per IP.

tested_features.clinical_examination_fields: PASS - All 12 new fields stored correctly
tested_features.gbr_procedure_type: PASS - 'Implant Placement with Guided Bone Regeneration' accepted
tested_features.prosthetic_plan_other: PASS - Custom prosthetic plan field stored
tested_features.risk_calculator_medical: PASS - Medical assessment integrated into risk calculation

tested_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - All roles authenticate correctly, rate limited 5/min
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures: 200 - Accepts all new clinical examination fields
tested_endpoints.GET /api/case-form-options: 200 - Returns procedure_types, loading_types (now includes Early Loading), prosthetic_options
tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/calculate-risk: 200 - Accepts medical_assessment, returns medical risk factor

bug_fix_applied.description: Added 'Early Loading' to LOADING_TYPES constant to match validation logic on line 798
